claims.name: E_plus_estimator_exact
claims.detail: (random sphere E_+ = 2N^2 - N exactly for N=16,32,64: estimator exact, the code-audit gate)

claims.name: lemma_E_plus_le_1plusTprime_Nsq
claims.detail: (E_+(Q) <= (1+T'(Q))N^2 holds for EVERY config -- the rigorous proof check; a failure here would refute the lemma)

claims.name: Tprime_O1_for_unstructured
claims.detail: (T' = 2 for random/great-circle (O(1)): by the lemma E_+ <= (1+T')N^2 these sets satisfy DR-2 (E_+ = O(N^2)) UNCONDITIONALLY and elementarily -- no decoupling needed; E_+/N^2 = 1.98/2.95)

claims.name: Tprime_grows_with_structure
claims.detail: (T' climbs with additive structure: unstructured 2 -> grid 8 -> engineered rich latitude circle 64 = N: the circle-richness obstruction is REAL and reaches the max N, so the reduction is non-vacuous. NB the lemma is SUFFICIENT not tight -- the rich circle has T'=N yet E_+ ~ 3.0 N^2, so bounding T' is potentially stronger than DR-2)

claims.name: Tprime_bounded_in_N_generic
claims.detail: (random-set T' stays O(1) as N grows: [(32, 2), (64, 2), (128, 2)]; consistent with E_+ ~ N^2 for generic sphere sets)
